advisory_action: Irrigate now or apply partial irrigation
advisory_reason: High water stress (Ks=0.014) with very low forecast rain (0.5 mm in the next 24 hours, below 2 mm threshold). Immediate irrigation is recommended.
advisory_limitations: FAO-56 status is from the interpolated-Kc water balance (smoothed Kc transitions between mango growth stages). Kc values are not field-calibrated for this specific orchard or cultivar. | No soil-moisture sensor validation — depletion estimates carry model uncertainty. | No irrigation-event records; all FAO-56 models are rainfed-only depletion balances. | FAO-56 status is 5 day(s) old (last date: 2026-07-17). Re-run `python main.py` to fetch fresh data and refresh the advisory before acting on it. | Forecast is at daily resolution — 6-hour and 12-hour rainfall totals are not computable. Decision thresholds are applied to the next-24-hour total. | Rain probability is not provided in the current Open-Meteo daily output and has been omitted from this advisory.
